ogTitle: Aire Valley vs Airly: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Aire Valley and Airly.
heading: Aire Valley vs Airly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aire Valley, Victoria and Airly, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Airly has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Aire Valley (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aire Valley or Airly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aire Valley has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Airly scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aire Valley scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Airly scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aire Valley or Airly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Airly has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
